env SIN_CODE_CONFIG_DIR=$WORK/config
mkdir $WORK/config
sin-code orchestrator-run agent-set myagent model=gpt-4o provider=openai
stdout 'Updated'
sin-code orchestrator-run agent-show myagent
stdout 'provider:'
stdout 'openai'
stdout 'model:'
stdout 'gpt-4o'
sin-code orchestrator-run agent-reset myagent
stdout 'Reset agent myagent'
